# image

The **image** field type — a data-view-only media type for image URLs.

This barrel registers ONLY the `FieldIdentity` (label, icon, `coerce: String`)
in the `fields.identity` registry. Image is a *sparse* media type: it ships only
a read-only thumbnail cell and no filter.

- `plugins/table` — the read-only `ImageCell` (`data-view.cell`): a small
  thumbnail of the projected image URL.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Image field type: identity only. The read-only thumbnail cell lives in the plugins/table sub-plugin; image is a data-view-only media type with no filter (sparse).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Fields.Identity` "image"
  - Uses: `fields.Fields`
- Core:
  - Uses:
    - `fields.defineFieldIdentity`
    - `fields.defineFieldType`
  - Exports (values):
    - `imageFieldType`
    - `imageIdentity`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`table`** — Image field type: data-view table cell (read-only thumbnail).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
